arts.ttl: Sheffield United Need “Tough Mindset” to Get Something at Luton, Wilder Says
arts.sum: Sheffield United travel south to take on bottom-of-the-table Luton Town on Saturday afternoon, aiming to continue their impressive run of form. The Blades sit in second place in the Championship and have won three consecutive matches, with their latest triumph being a convincing 3-1 victory over Middlesbrough. arts.ttl: Luton Town vs Sheffield United – Preview
arts.sum: Second place Sheffield United head down south to take on Luton Town on Saturday afternoon, with the Hatters sitting at the bottom of the Championship. The Blades have won their last three games coming into this weekend, with their midweek victory, 3-1 over Middlesbrough, being their best performance and result arguably since late November.
